variant: US-session-only (08:00-17:00 ET, indicators computed on US data only)
conclusion: US session restriction dramatically improves edge quality. Asia/Europe noise was diluting a real US-session edge. PF 1.58 with Sharpe 2.92 on US-only data. Walk-forward consistent (1.16/1.30). First validated non-equity strategy candidate.
next_step: Run through validation battery as probationary candidate. Consider adding to registry with status=testing.
